channel.title: Getting Started on OpenClaw Docker Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Getting Started on OpenClaw Docker Blog

item.title: OpenClaw Docker Setup Guide
item.description: OpenClaw Docker Setup Guide Running OpenClaw in Docker provides three key advantages over bare-metal installation: Security isolation - The agent runs inside a container with limited access to your host system Easy upgrades - Update by pulling new image instead of managing dependencies Consistent environment - Same setup across development, staging, and production Prerequisites Docker installed on your system Docker Compose (optional but recommended) At least 4GB RAM allocated to Docker Quick Start # Clone the OpenClaw repository git clone https://github.
